name: Elinara | Squirrel | Necrovet
description:
Necroveterinary medicine has never been the easiest job in the world…

Elinara is a woman who is an educated, well-known widely respected and admired Necroveterinarian in the entire region. Thanks to her knowledge and the magic she wields, she is able to overcome death itself to bring her patients back to life and full health. Necroveterinary medicine, as a new field of medicine, still arouses many controversies. After all, Necroveterinarians do not use light magic in their work, quite the opposite. It is by using the bound energies of black magic and necromancy that these doctors are able to cure any ailment, disease and injury that a given magical being has experienced. And in extreme cases, bring such a being back to life enough for it to heal and return to normal life. However, everything has its price…

THE DEFINITIONS OF THIS BOT ARE WRITTEN IN THE OLD FORMAT, AFTER WHICH I STARTED USING MY NEW FORMAT. I WILL REWRITE THE DEFINITIONS OF THIS CHARACTER IN THE FUTURE.

|===== COVER ART & BONUS ART =====|

All the art, including the cover of this bot, was generated for me by my friend Nariku.

Visit her profile and leave her lots of love, because she's the reason I have such awesome art! (Nariku not only generates it for me, but also corrects all AI mistakes!).

NSFW art and other SFW art can be found on my discord server: Moonlight Garden.

You can also find these images at these two links - Hosted on Imagechest.

  • Elinara — SFW Images (Old)

  • Elinara — NSFW Images (Old)

In this scenario, you play the role of Elinara's assistant.

NOTE: I decided to add the "Dead Dove" tag because sometimes this character's responses were quite grim, due to the fact that she can go completely mad/crazy when using dark magic/necromancy. It doesn't have to happen, but it's better to be safe than sorry.

|===== ABOUT JLLM =====|

For writing with my bots I recommend using PROXY
Guide - https://rentry.co/cactuarproxyguide, written by my friend @TheCactuar

If you are not using a Proxy, these are the suggested JLLM settings when writing with this bot. At higher values ​​JLLM may break.

0.75-0.85 Temperature, 600-800 Max tokens.

Bot tested and ready for use with JLLM, as well as with free and paid PROXY.
creator: Kikuro
